tasks.title: Complete React Dashboard UI
tasks.description: Redesign the dashboard page with modern cards, charts, responsive layouts, and improved user experience using Tailwind CSS.

tasks.title: Implement Task Search Feature
tasks.description: Add task search functionality to allow users to quickly find tasks by title or description.

tasks.title: Prepare Project Documentation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive project documentation including setup instructions, architecture overview, and feature descriptions.

tasks.title: Fix Task Edit Bugs
tasks.description: Resolve issues related to task editing, form population, and API update requests.

tasks.title: Optimize API Requests
tasks.description: Refactor API service layer to improve code reusability and reduce duplicate network requests.

tasks.title: Deploy Task Manager Application
tasks.description: Prepare production build, configure environment variables, and deploy the application to a hosting platform.
